_comment: FINAL release list = 3 items. The following were REMOVED from the old repo releases.json during design: 'Celestial Electronics vol.1 Rozselini', 'Telepresence', 'Krama Installation 2021', 'Anisotropy'. Display order is newest-first as below. Each renders with a BUY link (bandcamp_link).

releases.title: Diataxis
releases.label: JUNE Records
releases.description: Interprets Αναπαράσταση Δυνάμεων (1990), a painting by Anastasios Savvaidis, through principles of optical networks. Pressed on 12″ vinyl with an A3 poster of the original painting.

releases.title: DEC/PDC
releases.label: JUNE Records
releases.description: Two live-recorded pieces interpreting distributed-computing principles, with layered fragments that merge and dissipate. Limited-edition transparent lathe-cut 7″ vinyl.

releases.title: NSA Trusted Networks
releases.label: Lower Parts
releases.description: Debut album, inspired by early computer networks and live-recorded with ’90s Yamaha synthesizers. Pressed on 12″ vinyl with an included A3 poster by Layer Based Human Activities.
